title: Collected Wheel Publications Volume XVIII
author: Bhikkhu Bodhi
description: This book contains fifteen numbers of the renowned Wheel Publication series, dealing with various aspects of the Buddha’s teaching. Wheel Publication No. 265: Buddhism and Society—Heinz Bechert 266–7: Wayfaring—Bhikkhu Sobin S. Namto 268: The Second Discourse of the Buddha—Dr. K. N. G. Mendis 269: T
